channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: King Charles III's U.S. Visit Highlights Transatlantic Tensions and Diplomatic Challenges
item.description: King Charles III is set to make his first state visit to the United States as monarch, accompanied by Queen Camilla. The four-day trip aims to celebrate the 250th anniversary of American independence ...

item.title: West Bengal Records 92.8% Voter Turnout in Phase 1 of Assembly Polls, Highest in State History
item.description: West Bengal achieved a record-breaking voter turnout of 92.8% in the first phase of the 2026 assembly elections, marking the highest ever in the state's history and the second highest in any Indian st...

item.title: Governor Zulum Praises Tinubu for N68bn Intervention in Maiduguri Power Project
item.description: Governor Babagana Umara Zulum of Borno State has expressed his deep appreciation to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for approving a N68 billion operational support for the Maiduguri Emergency Power Plant ...

item.title: Scottish Labour Leader Anas Sarwar Aims to Challenge SNP Dominance in Holyrood Election
item.description: Scottish Labour leader Anas Sarwar is determined to defy polling predictions in the upcoming Holyrood election, claiming that the media overemphasises numbers while voters are open to change. With the...

item.title: Human Skull Discovered by Hiker Prompts Investigation in San Bernardino County
item.description: Authorities in San Bernardino County launched an investigation after a hiker discovered what was later confirmed to be a human skull near Twentynine Palms on the morning of April 23, 2026. The discove...

item.title: Labor likely to reject proposed gas export tax amid fuel supply concerns
item.description: Labor is expected to forego introducing a 25% gas export tax in next month’s budget, prompting independent senator David Pocock to criticise the government for appearing to side with gas companies. Pr...

item.title: Concerns Over U.S. Nuclear Policy and Its Impact on Global Non-Proliferation
item.description: The article argues that recent U.S. nuclear policy under President Donald Trump is increasing global instability and weakening the international system designed to prevent nuclear proliferation. It dr...

item.title: Fasting vs time-restricted eating: key differences and how to protect muscle health
item.description: Nutritionist Sarah Di Lorenzo explains the important distinction between intermittent fasting (IF) and time-restricted eating (TRE), highlighting how each approach affects metabolism, weight loss, and...

item.title: Young first-time voters in Tamil Nadu share their voting experiences and enthusiasm
item.description: First-time voters in Tamil Nadu displayed notable enthusiasm and a strong sense of civic responsibility while casting their votes in the Assembly elections. Many young voters described the experience ...

item.title: Europe’s Challenges and Opportunities: A Call for Action
item.description: Europe faces an array of significant threats, including Russian aggression, rising nationalism, and an economic slowdown. Despite these challenges, there remains optimism as Europe continues to posses...

item.title: NPMC reports stable transport fares despite public complaints and fuel price impact
item.description: The National Price Monitoring Committee (NPMC), chaired by Planning Minister Ahsan Iqbal, has stated that transport fares across the country have remained unchanged, even though there have been widesp...

item.title: Growing Interest in Dividend Stocks as i-invest Improves Market Access and Timing
item.description: Every dividend season for Nigeria stock market, one clear pattern dey show: share prices dey rise, investors dey show more interest, and many people wey bin stay sidelines go rush enter market. Accord...

item.title: Rivers Judiciary Defends Judge over Contempt Ruling, Rejects NBA Criticism
item.description: The Rivers State Judiciary has reacted to the Nigerian Bar Association’s national statement on the jailing of a Port Harcourt lawyer for alleged contempt of court, insisting that the judge acted withi...

item.title: Trump announces three-week extension of Israel-Lebanon ceasefire amid ongoing conflict
item.description: United States President Donald Trump has announced that the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will be extended by an additional three weeks following fresh discussions with officials from both coun...

item.title: Oil prices rise above $105 amid ongoing US-Iran naval standoff in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Oil prices have surged above $105 per barrel as tensions between the United States and Iran escalate over the Strait of Hormuz, a key maritime route for global oil shipments. The waterway remains clos...

item.title: FCC Extends Restrictions on Foreign-Made Routers to Include Consumer Wi-Fi Hotspots and LTE/5G Home Internet Devices
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has updated its regulations to expand the ban on foreign-made routers to include consumer-grade portable Wi-Fi hotspots and LTE/5G home internet devices. Th...

item.title: Vuyelwa Maluleke explores identity, memory and queer life in township-set ‘The Blue Album’
item.description: Vuyelwa Maluleke’s one-woman theatre production, The Blue Album, is a deeply reflective work that interrogates identity, language and belonging within the South African township context. An award-nomi...

item.title: Trial Examines Cause of Mississauga Bus Crash That Killed One Person
item.description: The trial of Mississauga transit bus driver Baljeet Dhaliwal continued with closing arguments in Brampton, Ontario, over a fatal crash that occurred on June 8, 2023. The collision involved a MiWay bus...

item.title: Gene therapy helps restore vision in six-year-old girl with rare genetic condition
item.description: A six-year-old girl with a rare inherited eye disorder has experienced a significant improvement in her vision after receiving an experimental gene therapy, according to her parents and medical team. ...

item.title: Vice Ganda features Francine Diaz wearing a jersey-made bag on It’s Showtime
item.description: On the popular Filipino noontime show 'It’s Showtime,' comedian and host Vice Ganda highlighted a unique fashion piece by having actress Francine Diaz showcase a bag made entirely from jersey material...
